---
description: FLET with two bindings at unlimited margin
column: 0
right-margin: [nil]
---
(flet ((compute-total (x) (+ x tax)) (compute-discount (price rate) (* price (- 1.0 rate)))) (mapcar #'compute-total prices))
---
(flet ((compute-total (x)
         (+ x tax))
       (compute-discount (price rate)
         (* price (- 1.0 rate))))
  (mapcar #'compute-total prices))
---
